name: Cream of Whatever Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
To make 1 can of soup, combine 1/3 cup of the mix with 1 cup of water. Cook and stir until thickened.
Here's a recipe for a MIX you can use to substitute for Cream of Chicken or Mushroom soup in your recipes. It is much less expensive than buying canned soups and freezes well!
